title: Bountiful Example Pack
description: An example Data Pack for Bountiful for Modpack makers to use as a template.
body:
This is an example pack for Bountiful. It modifies how bounty board objectives behave in the game!

This data pack is NOT intended for regular users - rather, it's meant to be an example for Modpack authors to use when creating data packs for Bountiful. As such, it is not balanced. Instead, it shows how several common operations might be done (adding, removing, changing bounty objectives and rewards).
